close_reason: Implemented Snapshot module with write, read, read_latest, list, latest_version, delete, delete_older_than, exists?, count. Supports conditional writes and materializer cold start scenario. All 24 tests pass.
description: Path: /{cluster}/shards/{tag}/snapshots/{inverted_version}. Write snapshot with conditional put. Read latest snapshot (list + get). Tests: write/read round-trip, conditional write conflict.
title: Snapshot storage
